parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;

const severityEmoji = { critical: '🔴', warning: '🟡', info: '🔵' }[data.severity] || '⚪';

const report = [
  `${severityEmoji} *SRE Copilot Incident Report*`,
  `*Alert:* ${data.alert}`,
  `*Namespace:* ${data.namespace}`,
  `*Severity:* ${(data.severity || '').toUpperCase()}`,
  `*Classification:* ${data.classification}`,
  `*Root Cause:* ${data.rootCause}`,
  '',
  `*Auto-Remediated:* ${data.autoRemediated ? '✅ Yes' : '❌ No'}`,
  data.prUrl && data.prUrl !== 'none' ? `*GitOps PR:* ${data.prUrl}` : '',
  data.argoCDSync ? '*ArgoCD:* Sync triggered ✅' : '',
  '',
  `*Runbook:*`,
  data.runbook,
].filter(Boolean).join('\n');

return [{ json: { report, ...data } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'processed', message: 'Alert handled by SRE Copilot', results: $('Parse Agent Response').all().map(i => i.json) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ignored', message: 'Alert not firing, skipped' }) }}
